title: carex scabriuscula
intro: Carex scabriuscula, also known as the hairy sedge, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex scabriuscula include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Carex scabriuscula can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable resource for those seeking natural remedies for skin issues.
